data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an override option for preferred clients to see full availability. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case describes the intended behavior but lacks concrete evidence to demonstrate that the override option is available and functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming the override option for preferred clients.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for override option functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that preferred clients can access full availability through the override option.
